publicationstmt.publisher: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

profiledesc.creation: This finding aid was produced using ArchivesSpace on 2023-03-20 23:14:47 UTC.

change.item: This resource was modified by the ArchivesSpace Preprocessor developed by the Harvard Library (https://github.com/harvard-library/archivesspace-preprocessor)

repository.corpname: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

did.unittitle: Left wing organizations printed items
did.physdesc: Speeches, reports, printed materials, newsletters, and manuscripts.
did.abstract: Speeches, reports, pamphlets, newsletters, flyers, and unpublished items written or distributed by left wing organizations.

defitem.label: Contact Information:
defitem.item: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections 2B Carl A. Kroch Library Cornell University Ithaca, NY 14853 (607) 255-3530 Fax: (607) 255-9524rareref@cornell.eduhttp://rmc.library.cornell.edu

scopecontent.head: COLLECTION DESCRIPTION
scopecontent.p: Speeches, reports, pamphlets, newsletters, flyers, and unpublished items written or distributed by left wing organizations. Includes pamphlets by Upton Sinclair and Sumner H. Slichter; newsletters of the League for Independent Political Action; flyers of the Socialist Party; and material concerning women's political issues.

prefercite.head: Cite As:
prefercite.p: Left Wing Organizations. Printed Items, #3448. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.

unittitle.extref: Link to a partial finding aid.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: All the material in the collection may not be covered by this guide.

did.unittitle: Series I. Published Pamphlets
